utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Therefore, 7/7 items are included and fully specified.
